title: UCCL-IKF-AIO-STO-0124 NeoART-an international phase Ib/II platform trial investigating trastuzumab deruxtecan (T-DXd) combined with neoadjuvant chemotherapy for HER2-positive, resectable esophagogastric adenocarcinoma (EGA).
snippet: Despite advances in the multimodal treatment of resectable esophagogastric adenocarcinoma (EGA), relapse rates remain high, resulting in a cure rate of <50%. Recently, perioperative durvalumab in combination with chemotherapy (ctx) has shown improved event-free survival in biomarker-unselected patients with resectable EGA.
